source_pr.title: support index scan.
source_pr.body:
@coocood @zimulala @shenli PTAL
Now we can support index scan.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by b, a").Check(testkit.Rows("2 3", "3 4", "1 5", "7 6", "4 8", "6 8")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by b, a").Check(testkit.Rows("2 3", "3 4", "1 5", "7 6", "4 8", "6 8")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by b, a").Check(testkit.Rows("2 3", "3 4", "1 5", "7 6", "4 8", "6 8")) (executor/executor_test.go)

files: executor/builder.go, executor/executor.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/executor_xapi.go, executor/new_builder.go, executor/new_executor.go, executor/new_executor_xapi.go, executor/union_scan.go, plan/column_pruning.go, plan/expression_rewriter.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plans.go, plan/new_plan_test.go, plan/optimizer.go, plan/physical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/plan.go, plan/planbuilder.go, plan/plans.go, plan/predicate_push_down.go, plan/refiner.go, plan/stringer.go
